case_title: AVALON BAY COMMUNITIES, INC. VS. CHAR RUPPEL et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT RE ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, THREE DAY NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALON BAY COMMUNITIES, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVALON BAY COMMUNITIES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUPPEL, CHAR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 255 KING ST. APT. #541 S.F. CA. 94107, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $76.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALON BAY COMMUNITIES, INC.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RUPPEL, CHAR
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALON BAY COMMUNITIES, INC.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALON BAY COMMUNITIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RUPPEL, CHAR
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RUPPEL, CHAR
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALON BAY COMMUNITIES, INC. SERVED NOV-16-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUPPEL, CHAR
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALON BAY COMMUNITIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RUPPEL, CHAR DOES 1-V SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT RUPPEL, CHAR
